headline: Vendavo Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for B2B Pricing & Rebate Optimization Software
summary: Vendavo, the leader in AI-powered pricing, quoting and rebates to turn complexity into commercial advantage, today announced it has been named a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for B2B Pricing & Rebate Optimization Software.

headline: Credo AI Advances AI Governance in Healthcare Through Coalition for Health AI (CHAI) Partnership
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 28, 2026--Healthcare organizations are rapidly advancing AI adoption, yet many lack coordinated governance, policies, and operational frameworks to manage risk and scale effectively. According to leading analyst firm Gartner, AI governance has become a top strategic priority as organizations work to ensure safe, ethical, and scalable deployment across clinical and operational systems.

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral on Gartner, Lowers Price Target to $171
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst George Tong   maintains Gartner (NYSE:IT) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $220 to $171.

headline: Tech's hyperscalers face Wall Street for first time since U.S. Iran war sent oil prices soaring
summary: Wall Street is optimistic about big tech companies and their data center construction plans, despite a memory shortage and the Iran war.

raw.headline: Tech's hyperscalers face Wall Street for first time since U.S. Iran war sent oil prices soaring

headline: Gartner Survey Finds 85% of Service and Support Leaders are Expanding Human Agent Responsibilities Despite Expectations of Mass AI Layoffs
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., April 28, 2026--Eighty-five percent of customer service and support leaders are expanding human agent responsibilities as AI reduces contact volume and shifts work toward higher-value tasks, according to a survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company. Just thirty-one percent have implemented, or are planning, frontline workforce reductions through layoffs in response to AI through 1Q27.
